channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Rays' leadership, Pinellas commission at odds over new stadium
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rays' future in St. Petersburg remains in doubt, as team leadership and Pinellas County commissioners are at odds over the plans for a new stadium.
item.dc:creator: Beth Rousseau, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Kurtenbach: The music has stopped playing for the ‘last dance’ 49ers
item.description: The Niners have been outscored 73-20 in their last two games, but they say they can make the playoffs.
item.dc:creator: Dieter Kurtenbach, The Mercury News

item.title: Christian McCaffrey's season 'potentially' over after knee injury in 49ers' loss to Bills
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — San Francisco running back Christian McCaffrey suffered a knee injury that coach Kyle Shanahan described as “potentially” season-ending in the 49ers’ 35-10 loss to the Buffalo Bills on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Violent hit on Jaguars QB Trevor Lawrence 'has no business being in our league,' coach says
item.description: JACKSONVILLE, Fla. (AP) — Trevor Lawrence walked out of EverBank Stadium with his wife by his side and a smile on his face, a positive sign for the oft-injured Jacksonville Jaguars quarterback.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Vikings win 5th straight, rallying past Cardinals 23-22 on Sam Darnold's TD pass with 1:13 left
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — The Minnesota Vikings were searching for an offensive rhythm well past halftime. Aaron Jones had another early turnover. This confident, connected and resilient team didn't flinch.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Big Ten dishes out hefty fines to Michigan, Ohio State after postgame melee
item.description: The Big Ten Conference on Sunday announced $100,000 fines for Michigan and Ohio State after a massive brawl at the end of their rivalry game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Texans find momentum heading into bye with 23-20 win at Jaguars after knocking out QB Lawrence
item.description: JACKSONVILLE, Fla. (AP) — The Houston Texans found some much-needed momentum — call it “Joe-mentum” — before their bye week.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: 6 Chicagoland prep football programs bring home IHSA state championships over the weekend in Normal
item.description: Six Chicagoland prep football programs, including two from the city, claimed Illinois High School Association state championships over Thanksgiving weekend in Normal.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: No. 17 Iowa St beats Wildcats 29-21 for first 10-win season, will play Sun Devils for Big 12 title
item.description: AMES, Iowa (AP) — Rocco Becht threw for two touchdowns and ran for another and No. 17 Iowa State's defense came up with big stops in the second half to help the Cyclones beat Kansas State 29-21 on a cold Saturday night for the first 10-win season in program history.
item.dc:creator: PAVLE MARKOVIC, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Michigan, Ohio State players brawl after Wolverines beat No. 2 Buckeyes. Police use pepper spray
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (AP) — A fight broke out at midfield after Michigan stunned No. 2 Ohio State 13-10 on Saturday when Wolverines players attempted to plant their flag on the OSU logo and were confronted by the Buckeyes.
item.dc:creator: MITCH STACY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utes women upset #3 Notre Dame, 78-67
item.description: GEORGE TOWN, CAYMAN ISLANDS — The Utah women's basketball team picked up their highest ranked win outside of the Huntsman Center in school history by taking down No. 3 Notre Dame, 78-67, in the final game of the Cayman Island Classic.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Syracuse knocks No. 6 Miami out of ACC title game and possibly the playoff with 42-38 win
item.description: SYRACUSE, N.Y. (AP) — Kyle McCord and Syracuse knocked No. 6 Miami out of Atlantic Coast Conference title contention — and possibly ended the Hurricanes' College Football Playoff hopes — by rallying from a 21-0 deficit for a 42-38 win on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: MARK FRANK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: San Jose State's volleyball season that ignited debate over gender in sports ends in MW title match
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — San Jose State's volleyball team, the subject of a national debate about participation in women's sports, was beaten by Colorado State 27-25, 25-20, 23-25, 25-16 in Saturday's Mountain West tournament final, ending the Spartans' season.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utes close disappointing season with 28-14 victory
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (ABC4 Sports) - Utah forced three turnovers and scored two defensive touchdowns Friday night, including a 60-yard pick-6 by Zemaiah Vaughn, as the Utes snapped a seven-game losing streak with a 28-14 victory over UCF.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: USU wins NIT season tip-off over North Texas, 61-57
item.description: ORLANDO (ABC4 Sports) - A career-best scoring performance from Mason Falslev helped lead Utah State men’s basketball (7-0, 0-0 MW) to a championship game title at the NIT Season Tip-Off Friday evening, as the Aggies defeated North Texas 61-57 at the ESPN Wide World of Sports Complex.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Colorado Buffaloes finishes season with a win over Oklahoma State 52-0
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Colorado head coach Deion Sanders confidently told the media before the game that his team wasn’t just aiming to win but to dominate. Travis Hunter wasted no time backing up that claim.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Tatum scores 35, Pritchard adds 29 off the bench and Celtics outlast Bulls 138-129
item.description: Jayson Tatum scored 35 points and had 14 rebounds to lead the Boston Celtics past the Chicago Bulls 138-129 in Friday night’s NBA Cup pool game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Spurgeon breaks 33-game scoreless streak with two goals, Minnesota beats Chicago 3-2
item.description: ST. PAUL, Minn. (AP) — Jared Spurgeon ended a 33-game scoring drought with two of Minnesota’s three second-period goals and the Wild beat the Chicago Blackhawks 3-2 on Friday. Marco Rossi also scored for Minnesota and Marc-Andre Fleury, who turned 40 on Thursday, made 20 saves to improve to 5-0-1.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Alabama A&M player Medrick Burnett Jr. dies following injury during game
item.description: Medrick Burnett Jr., a 20-year-old football player for Alabama A&M University, died Wednesday a month after sustaining a serious injury during a football game.
item.dc:creator: Drew Taylor, NewsNation

item.title: Chicago Bears fire head coach Matt Eberflus
item.description: The Chicago Bears have fired head coach Matt Eberflus following a six-game losing streak, with offensive coordinator Thomas Brown serving as interim coach.
item.dc:creator: Marisa Rodriguez, WGN 9

item.title: 49ers to likely play Bills in heavy snow, 'dangerously cold wind chills': NWS
item.description: (KRON) -- In last week's 38-10 blowout loss to the Green Bay Packers, the 49ers' loss had little to do with the weather at Lambeau Field, also known as "The Frozen Tundra." At kickoff, it was a calm 42 degrees and mostly cloudy in the typical chilly Midwest city.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Hall's fifth career hat trick leads Blackhawks over Stars 6-2
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Taylor Hall scored his fifth career hat trick, Connor Bedard, Teuvo Teravainen and Louis Crevier also scored, and the Chicago Blackhawks beat the Dallas Stars 6-2 on Wednesday night for their second win in three games. Hall’s game-opening goal 17 seconds in set the tone.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Tom Wilson's power-play goal lifts the Capitals over the Lightning 5-4
item.description: Tom Wilson scored a power-play goal with 3:26 left in regulation to lift the Washington Capitals to a 5-4 victory against the Tampa Bay Lightning on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: New York Jets hire 33rd team to assist in hiring process
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- An organizational shift is upon us for the New York Jets. Owner Woody Johnson has hired the 33rd team which was founded by former Jets GM Mike Tannenbaum in 2019, to help aid the Jets search.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Real Salt Lake makes 2024 season-end roster decisions
item.description: Real Salt Lake has revealed its end-of-season roster decision following a record-setting 2024 campaign in Major League Soccer.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4
